title: coleus tetragonus
intro: Coleus tetragonus, also known as the horned leaf plant, is a type of flowering plant native to the tropical regions of Asia and Australia. It is traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Coleus tetragonus are numerous, including reducing fever, treating skin conditions, and alleviating digestive issues. In herbal preparations, the leaves of the plant are typically dried and used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
